zh.lifeSummary: 當Alfonso De Molina於1202年1月27日出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安利安時，他的父親Alfonso De León IX30歲，母親Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León22歲。他於1224年與Teresa Perez de Braganza在西班牙結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1272年1月6日在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安薩拉曼卡享年69歲，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈希達德 雷亞爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alfonso De Molina于1202年1月27日出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安利安时，他的父亲Alfonso De León IX30岁，母亲Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León22岁。他于1224年与Teresa Perez de Braganza在西班牙结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1272年1月6日在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安薩拉曼卡享年69岁，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞-拉 曼哈希達德 雷亞爾。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Molina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Carlos, Luis, Manuel, Jesus, Francisco, Jorge, Mario, Miguel, Ana, Roberto.  Portuguese Joao, Margarida.

Spanish, Catalan, and Jewish (Sephardic): habitational name from any of numerous places called Molina, in particular the one in Guadalajara province. This surname is also found in France (compare   Moline  ). For certain Jewish families, this is an adoption of the Iberian surname at the moment of conversion to Roman Catholicism. After the return to Judaism (generations later), some descendants retained the name their families used as Catholics.

variants.name: Moline
meanings: Catalan (Moliné): occupational name for a miller, from moliner miller. This surname is also found in southern France.
French and Jewish (from France): altered form of   Molina  , a surname of Spanish and Catalan origin.

nameMeanings.name: Alfonso
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Visigothic: probably a compound of adal ‘noble’ + funs ‘ready’; a traditional royal name.

en.lifeSummary: When Alfonso De Molina was born on 27 January 1202, in León, Castilla y León, Spain, his father, Alfonso De León IX, was 30 and his mother, Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León, was 22. He married Teresa Perez de Braganza in 1224, in Spain. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 6 January 1272, in Salamanca, Castilla y León, Spain, at the age of 69, and was buried in Ciudad Real, Castilla-La Mancha, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alfonso De Molina est né le 27 janvier 1202, à León, Castilla y León, Espagne, son père, Alfonso De León IX, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Teresa Perez de Braganza en 1224, à Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 6 janvier 1272, à Salamanca, Castilla y León, Espagne, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Ciudad Real, Castilla-La Mancha, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alfonso De Molina am 27. Januar 1202 in León, Castilla y León, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alfonso De León IX 30 und seine Mutter Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León 22. Er hat 1224 in Spanien Teresa Perez de Braganza geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 6. Januar 1272 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Salamanca, Castilla y León, Spanien und wurde in Ciudad Real, Castilla-La Mancha, Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alfonso De Molina è nato il il 27 gennaio 1202 nel León, Castilla y León, Spagna, il suo padre, Alfonso De León IX, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Teresa Perez de Braganza nel 1224, nel Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 6 gennaio 1272, nel Salamanca, Castilla y León, Spagna, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Ciudad Real, Castilla-La Mancha, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Alfonso De Molinaが1202年1月27日にスペインカスティラ イ レoンレoンで生まれた時，父Alfonso De León IXは30歳，母Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de Leónは22歳であった。1224年にスペインでTeresa Perez de Braganzaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1272年1月6日にスペインカスティラ イ レoンサラマンカで69歳で死去し，スペインカスティラ-ラ マンチャシウダド レアルにて埋葬された。

ko.of, Molina, Guadalajara, Spain: 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 구아다라자라 모리나 데 아라그o

ko.Molina, Guadalajara, Spain: 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 구아다라자라 모리나 데 아라그o
ko.lifeSummary: Alfonso De Molina(이)가 1202년 1월 27일 스페인 카스틸라 이 레o 레o에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alfonso De León IX(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1224년 스페인에서 Teresa Perez de Braganza(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1272년 1월 6일 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 살램아카에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인 카스틸라-라 먼차 시우다드 리에 묻혔다.

pt.27 de enero de 1202–6 de enero de 1272: 27 de janeiro de 1202–6 de janeiro de 1272
pt.of, Molina, Guadalajara, Spain: Molina de Aragón, Guadalajara, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha
pt.Molina, Molina de Aragón, Guadalajara, C: Molina de Aragón, Guadalajara, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha
pt.Molina, Guadalajara, Spain: Molina de Aragón, Guadalajara, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alfonso De Molina nasceu em 27 de janeiro de 1202, em León, Castilla y León, Espanha, seu pai, Alfonso De León IX, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Teresa Perez de Braganza em 1224, em Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 6 de janeiro de 1272, em Salamanca, Castilla y León, Espanha, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Ciudad Real, Castilla-La Mancha, Espanha.

ru.Molina, Guadalajara, Spain: молаина де арагoн, гуадаладжара, кастилла-ла манча, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alfonso De Molina родился 27 января 1202 г. в местности леoн, кастилла и леoн, Испания, его отцу по имени Alfonso De León IX было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Teresa Perez de Braganza в 1224 г. в местности Испания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 6 января 1272 г. в местности салэманка, кастилла и леoн, Испания в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности сюдад риль, кастилла-ла манча, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alfonso De Molina nació el 27 de enero de 1202, en León, Castilla y León, España, su papá, Alfonso De León IX, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Berenguela de Castilla Reina de Castilla si reina consorte de León, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Teresa Perez de Braganza en 1224, en España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 6 de enero de 1272, en Salamanca, Castilla y León, España, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Ciudad Real, Castilla-La Mancha, España.
